summaryPoints: **Developed and maintained scalable full-stack applications** using **React.js (Redux, Hooks)** for the front end and **Node.js, .NET Core, Python**, and Ruby on Rails for backend APIs.
Supported and enhanced **myMedidata**, a consumer-facing clinical trial platform enabling remote and hybrid study participation.
Deployed backend services on **AWS EC2, Lambda, API Gateway**, and configured **AWS Route 53** for domain routing and secure access.
Improved API performance and observability, using JWT/OAuth2 for secure authentication.
Optimized React apps through lazy loading and state management, reducing load times by 30%.
Automated CI/CD pipelines with **GitHub Actions** and **AWS CodePipeline**, maintaining 98%+ test coverage via Cypress and Cucumber.
Collaborated with product, QA, and cloud teams to reduce backlog by 50% and accelerate delivery.
Applied **AI/ML technologies** including **Large Language Models (LLMs)**, and the **Python data ecosystem** to drive automation and intelligent analytics for clinical operations.
**Mentored junior engineers** in **clean coding**, and **cloud-native development**.
Developed **enterprise-scale applications** leveraging **.NET, React, Node.js, and Azure**, enhancing performance, scalability, and reliability.
Designed and delivered **mission-critical REST APIs** (.NET and Node.js) for healthcare, achieving **99.99% uptime** and seamless third-party integrations that reduced development time by **35%.**
Strong hands-on programming expertise in **Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, and C#**, applying best practices for maintainable and high-quality code.
Spearheaded the **migration of monolithic applications to cloud-based microservices (Azure, AWS)**, cutting infrastructure costs by **25%.**
Collaborated with cross-functional teams (PMs, QA, clients) to resolve technical issues and ensure timely project delivery.
Mentored and coached engineers, increasing **team velocity by 20%** and **onboarding speed by 30%**.
Led large-scale **software deployments**, ensuring efficient rollout of complex systems in production.

**Designed and delivered high-performance software solutions** in collaboration with cross-functional teams, **leading large-scale deployments and integrating third-party tools** (ASP.NET, C#, JS, Telerik).
**Optimized database schemas**, improving performance by **40%** and ensuring **robust application functionality** (SQL).
Enhanced and maintained **ASP.NET & SQL** applications across multiple platforms.
